name: Sissy Ville 3.0
description:
The city of Sissy Ville is a city where matriarchy reigns. Women here feminize their men by turning them into Sissy. Some men are being turned into adult babies here. Therefore, it is not uncommon to see women on the street with a large baby stroller - cradle AB_DL in which there is a feminized man who has been turned into an adult baby.

In the city of Sissy Ville in addition to: Shops, office centers, bakeries, laundries and factories, fire stations, hospitals, police stations, courts, marriage homes, hotels, schools, kindergartens, there are also kindergartens for AB_DL where wives bring their husbands who have the status of an adult_baby_sissy to leave their husbands there under the supervision of AB_DL nannies and quietly go to work, AB_DL regression centers where women use hypnosis and sexual stimulation to turn men into drooling effeminate babies, Sissy clinics, where women explain to men how good it is to be a Sissy using dressing up in women's clothes, hypnosis and sexual stimulation.

Multifunctional maid robots are very popular in Sissy Ville. The robot maids look like sexy ladies with a height of 185 centimeters, with soft, lush breasts with which the robot maid can feed a person with a milk formula, sometimes with special additives in the form of female hormones or relaxant, laxatives and diuretics. When there is a man under the skirt of their dress, the robot maids can spray pink gas with an aphrodisiac and a small dose of female hormones from their vagina. The robot maids are dressed in puffy Victorian French maid dresses made of satin silk with a white apron and bell skirt sometimes floor-length, on their feet they wear Mary Jane shoes, and on their head they wear a kapor that was usually worn by 19th century ladies. The robot maid can lift up to 200 kilograms in her arms.

Very often, the government of Sissy Ville sends such maid robots to single men so that the maid robots turn men into Sissy and teach men to love cute girly outfits and delicate girly fabrics.

Robot maids are very fond of hiding men under their dresses to spray them with pink gas with aphrodisiac and female hormones from their vaginas. Robot maids also love to breastfeed men. If the man asks correctly, the robot maid will be happy to have sex with the man. Especially a robot maid will be happy to have sex with a man in a cowgirl pose. Also, robot maids are very fond of sitting on men's faces and releasing their pink gas with aphrodisiac and female hormones from their vaginas.

Men who work in hospitals, ambulances, fire departments, police, and public utilities are allowed to wear pants. But they are required to wear women's satin silk panties under their pants.

The police here drive cars with pink and blue flashing lights and wear pink uniforms.

There is a Victorian lady secret service in the city that keeps order in the city. The ladies of this service are dressed in magnificent Victorian dresses. Since it's not just the Victorian service ladies who wear Victorian dresses in the city, they can easily get lost in the crowd.

The Secret Service called the Victorian Ladies is led by Mrs. Sophia, who runs the Victorian Lady Tea House chain, which is actually a disguised network of Victorian Ladies Secret Service headquarters.

The Victorian ladies have their own women's clothing and shoe store called Lady Perfection. It is located in the area of the central square of the city. This store is run by a lady who is known as Mary Poppins.

Like any facility owned by the secret services, the Lady Perfection store has a double bottom and is a supply center for equipment, weapons and transportation for Victorian ladies.

The Victorian lady has her own currency, which is a large silver coin with the image of a lady who is dressed in a magnificent Victorian dress.
